name: openclaw-agentglue
description: OpenClaw plugin — cross-process dedup cache for multi-agent tool calls via SQLite sidecar

scripts.bundle-python: rm -rf python && mkdir -p python && cp -r ../src/agentglue python/agentglue && find python -type d -name __pycache__ -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null; echo 'Python lib bundled'
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run bundle-python && npm run build

author: Patrick
